terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.1.title: Article 1 (Application)
terms.1.body: These terms apply to all users of AuctionBOT and ConnectC2X (collectively, the "Services") operated by Quo Labo. By using any of the Services, you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please refrain from using the Services.
terms.2.title: Article 2 (Overview)
terms.2.body:
The Services include:
- AuctionBOT: Auction management features on Discord. Free and paid (Pro) plans are available.
- ConnectC2X: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that enables Claude to access X/Twitter API on behalf of users.
The Services are developed and operated by an individual as a hobby and do not guarantee commercial quality.
terms.3.title: Article 3 (Changes to Terms)
terms.3.body: The operator may change these terms as needed. Changes will be communicated through reasonable means such as posting on the Services. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.
terms.4.title: Article 4 (Disclaimer)
terms.4.body: The Services are provided as-is. The operator does not guarantee uninterrupted operation, accuracy of information, or suitability for any particular purpose. The operator shall not be liable for any damages (including but not limited to data loss, lost profits, or damages arising from unauthorized access) resulting from use of the Services, unless caused by the operator's intentional misconduct or gross negligence. However, even in such cases, liability shall be limited to the amount of fees paid by the user in the preceding month.
terms.5.title: Article 5 (Prohibited Activities)
terms.5.body:
Users shall not engage in the following activities:
- Interfering with the operation or infrastructure of the Services
- Unauthorized access or attempts thereof
- Fraudulent activities or acts that harm other users
- Acts that violate laws or public order
- Excessive API calls or other acts that burden the system
- Reverse engineering, decompilation, or disassembly of the Services
- Using the Services for purposes that violate third-party terms of service (such as Discord or X)
terms.6.title: Article 6 (Paid Plans)
terms.6.body: Pro plans are monthly subscription services. Payments are processed through Stripe; the operator does not directly hold credit card information. Subscriptions can be cancelled anytime and remain active until the end of the billing period. Refunds are not provided. The operator may revise pricing with prior notice.
terms.7.title: Article 7 (Intellectual Property)
terms.7.body: All intellectual property rights related to the Services belong to the operator. Users may not reproduce, repost, modify, redistribute, or otherwise reuse the Services' content.
terms.8.title: Article 8 (Service Changes/Termination)
terms.8.body: The operator may change, suspend, or terminate the Services. For significant changes or termination, the operator will endeavor to notify users through reasonable means. Upon termination, refunds for unused paid periods will be provided.
terms.9.title: Article 9 (Minors)
terms.9.body: Minors must obtain consent from a legal guardian before using the Services. Consent from a legal guardian is required for paid plan subscriptions.
terms.10.title: Article 10 (Withdrawal)
terms.10.body: Users may stop using the Services at any time. Paid plan users can end their use by cancelling through Stripe's management page.
terms.11.title: Article 11 (Privacy)
terms.11.body: The Services obtain user information through Discord OAuth2 (AuctionBOT) and Google OAuth2 (ConnectC2X). This information is used solely for providing and improving the Services and will not be shared with or sold to third parties. Payment information is managed by Stripe; the operator does not directly hold it. Information provided through the contact form is used solely for responding to inquiries. Users may request disclosure, correction, or deletion of their personal information.
terms.12.title: Article 12 (Anti-Social Forces)
terms.12.body: Users represent and warrant that they are not members of anti-social forces. The operator may suspend service without prior notice if a user is determined to be associated with anti-social forces.
terms.13.title: Article 13 (User Environment)
terms.13.body: Users are responsible for preparing and maintaining communication devices, software, network connections, and other equipment necessary for using the Services at their own expense. The operator is not responsible for problems arising from the user's environment.
terms.14.title: Article 14 (Damages)
terms.14.body: If a user causes damage to the operator through violation of these terms or illegal activities, the operator may claim damages from the user.
terms.15.title: Article 15 (Communication)
terms.15.body: Communication between users and the operator shall be conducted through the designated contact form, email, or Discord. Notices from the operator shall be posted on the Services or communicated through other means deemed appropriate, and shall take effect at the time of dispatch.
terms.16.title: Article 16 (Severability)
terms.16.body: If any provision of these terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall remain in effect.
terms.17.title: Article 17 (Governing Law)
terms.17.body: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Japan. The Tokyo District Court shall have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes related to the Services.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Quo Labo (the operator of AuctionBOT and ConnectC2X, collectively the "Services") respects user privacy and is committed to protecting personal information. This policy describes how personal information is handled across the Services.
privacy.1.title: 1. Information Collected
privacy.1.body:
The Services collect the following information:

[AuctionBOT] Through Discord OAuth2:
- Discord User ID
- Server (Guild) ID and server name
- Server nickname

[ConnectC2X] Through Google OAuth2:
- Google account email address
- X API Bearer Token (encrypted with AES-256-GCM)
- API usage counts

Payment information (credit card numbers, etc.) is managed by Stripe and is not directly stored by the operator.
privacy.2.title: 2. Purpose of Use
privacy.2.body:
Collected information is used only for the following purposes:

- Providing and operating the Services
- Managing subscriptions
- Responding to inquiries
- Improving the Services
privacy.3.title: 3. Disclosure to Third Parties
privacy.3.body:
The operator will not provide or sell collected personal information to third parties, except in the following cases:

- When required by law
- With the user's consent
- To the extent necessary for payment processing by Stripe
privacy.4.title: 4. Data Storage
privacy.4.body:
AuctionBOT: Auction data and settlement data are stored in a database on servers managed by the operator.
ConnectC2X: X API Bearer Tokens are encrypted with AES-256-GCM and stored securely. Tokens are only decrypted when making API calls on the user's behalf.
Data that is no longer needed is appropriately deleted.
privacy.5.title: 5. Use of Cookies
privacy.5.body: The Services use cookies for session management. These cookies are used only to maintain login status and are not used for tracking purposes.
privacy.6.title: 6. User Rights
privacy.6.body:
Users may request the disclosure, correction, or deletion of their personal information by contacting the operator through the inquiry form.
ConnectC2X users can delete their X Bearer Token at any time from the dashboard.
privacy.7.title: 7. Policy Changes
privacy.7.body: The operator may change this policy as necessary. Users will be notified of significant changes through the Services.
